# BP-163 positive variant: a renamed update flag writes a snapshot unguarded.
lang: go
file: BP-163-variant-vulnerable_test.go
variant: renamed-update-without-short
---
package snapshots

import (
	"flag"
	"os"
	"testing"
)

var updateGolden = flag.Bool("update-golden", false, "rewrite snapshots")

func TestSnapshot(t *testing.T) {
	if *updateGolden {
		if err := os.Create("testdata/snapshot.json"); err != nil {
			t.Fatal(err)
		}
	}
}
